name: Ishq Jalebi
overview: An unusual family reunion at Muhammad Boota's residence slowly escalates into a series of realizations, family bonding, and a chance of young love between Bela and Basim.

trailers.title: Ishq Jalebi | Premiere on 1st Ramazan | HAR PAL GEO
